features: SKIP THE SOAK with New Fairy Skip the Soak Power Spray, a faster, effortless way to pre-treat your dishes for an impeccable clean
POWER OF AN OVERNIGHT SOAK IN MINUTES. Uniquely formulated to make pre-treating dishes easy and fast, so it gives you the power of an overnight soak in minutes

ONE SINGLE SOLUTION FOR YOUR DISHES & KITCHEN. Just scrape off excess food and spray directly to dishes before placing them in the dishwasher, or spray directly in the dishwasher after loading them and add your regular dishwasher tablets

Or just spray to tough messy dishes and wash by hand. For everyday messes, just spray and wipe, no water needed until rinsing. For tougher messes, let the suds sit a few minutes before wiping. You can also use it across your kitchen
REUSABLE SPRAYER: Fairy Skip the Soak Power Spray comes with a reusable sprayer that you can simply remove and replace on the refill bottle
description: Product Description SKIP THE SOAK WITH FAIRY DISH POWER SPRAY. Tired of soaking and scrubbing the dishes? Say goodbye to hours of soaking dishes to get rid of grease with Fairy Skip the Soak Power Spray. Designed to ease washing dishes with tough grease, without water, for fast & effortless impeccable clean. With it's formula effective on 100% grease, it gives you the power of an overnight soak in minutes! Just scrape off excess food and spray directly to dishes before placing them in the dishwasher or directly in the dishwasher, or washing them by hand. It is uniquely formulated to make pre-treating dishes easy, fast, and effortless, whether before loading them to dishwasher with your regular dishwashing tablets or washing by hand with your regular washing up liquid. For everyday messes, simply spray the suds on and wipe—no water needed until rinsing. For very tough messes, let the suds sit for a few minutes before wiping to get optimal results. Plus you can also use it across your kitchen, by spraying and wiping the sink and kitchen surfaces for a quick clean. Spray and wipe with a damp cloth. Very glossy surfaces you may want to wipe dry for perfect shine. Skip the Soak Power Spray, one single solution to tackle tough grease on dishes before dishwasher, before handwashing, and on kitchen surfaces for an effortless impeccable clean and irresistible freshness! Ingredients <5% Anionic Surfactants, Non-Ionic Surfactants, Perfumes, Limonene, Linalool Directions Automatic dishwashing or washing by hand: Designed to ease washing dishes with tough dirt without adding water. Scrape off excess food and spray directly to dishes. DO NOT ADD WATER. For heavy soils, leave product to act up to 20 minutes before loading in the dishwasher or washing by hand using regular dishwashing detergent. Cleaning kitchen surfaces and appliances: Spray and wipe with a damp cloth. Very glossy surfaces you many want to wipe dry for perfect shine. Not suitable for non-washable surfaces such as untreated/oiled wood. Avoid use on marble, copper, brass, brushed stainless steel, granite & aluminium to prevent damage/discoloration. If in doubt test on hidden area. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter & Gamble UK, Weybridge, Surrey, KT13 0XP See more
